name: PAETEC Holding Corp.
description: PAETEC Holding Corp. was a prominent telecommunications company based in Perinton, New York, that provided integrated communications services to business and institutional customers. The company offered a wide range of solutions, including voice, data, and internet services, primarily serving enterprise clients across the United States. Founded in 1998, PAETEC grew significantly through organic expansion and strategic acquisitions before being acquired by Windstream Corporation in 2011. Following the acquisition, the company ceased to exist as an independent entity, and its operations were integrated into Windstream's broader telecommunications infrastructure and service portfolio.
